name: Connect My Home
description: Setup and onboarding for smart home providers.

problem.statement: Users need to connect and configure their smart home providers.
goals: Guide users through connecting each provider

examples: I need to get HA config
I need to save HA config
I need to check all provider status
Can you check all provider status?
I need to list supported providers
I need to list HA rooms
I need to sync HA rooms
I need to list HA entities
I need to discover LG TV
I need to start Home Connect OAuth
Can you start Home Connect OAuth?
I need to complete Home Connect OAuth
Can you complete Home Connect OAuth?
I need to start Hue pairing
I need to complete Hue pairing
I need to check Hue status
I need to list Hue devices
I need to configure Tuya credentials
I need to complete Tuya auth
I need to check Tuya status
I need to list Tuya devices
I need to start Google OAuth
I need to complete Google OAuth
I need to check Google status
I need to list Google/Nest devices
I need to save WhatsApp credentials
I need to check WhatsApp status
I need to send WhatsApp test
I need to remove WhatsApp credentials

out_of_domain.message: This request is outside my capabilities.

scenarios.title: Get HA config
scenarios.description: User triggers "Get HA config" (e.g. "Get HA config") and the agent handles it end-to-end.
steps: User says: "Get HA config"
Agent calls config.get — get ha config
Agent presents results to the user
scenarios.expected_outcome: The agent successfully handles the "Get HA config" request and presents the result.
